# Automatyn

> Professional OpenClaw AI agent setup service for small businesses. We install, configure, and deploy AI automation bots on Telegram, Discord, Slack, and WhatsApp in 2-4 hours. Starting at $400 with a 14-day money-back guarantee.

## About
Automatyn is a done-for-you AI automation setup service. We handle the full OpenClaw installation for non-technical business owners who want AI agents running their customer support, lead follow-up, scheduling, and operations 24/7.

## Services
- OpenClaw installation and configuration: $400-$1,500
- Same-day setup (2-4 hours typical)
- Platforms: Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal
- Includes: server setup, bot configuration, security hardening, skills setup, live walkthrough
- 14-day money-back guarantee on all plans

## Pricing
- Starter Package: $400 — Single platform, core features
- Pro Package: $800 — Two platforms, advanced skills, priority support
- Business Package: $1,500 — All platforms, custom integrations, 30-day support
